_generated_interior.name: Home Office
_generated_interior.description: The interior of a home office.

visibility.world_tone: This world has a gritty, nocturnal atmosphere set in a near-future tech era, where dimly lit workspaces are cluttered but functional, evoking a mood of solitary focus, fatigue, and digital immersion.

turn_history.narrative: The cigarette smoke curls into the hazy beam of your monitor, a blue-grey ghost against the lines of code. You take a drag, the ember flaring briefly in the dim room, then exhale, tapping ash into a makeshift ceramic dish already crowded with butts. The cold, sweet tang of the soda cuts through the stale air as you take a sip, the can’s condensation damp on your fingers. Your focus is split between the stubborn bug on the screen and the calm, synthesized voice of your AI agent in your earpiece, patiently reiterating a debugging suggestion as your own tired eyes trace the same logic for the third time. The only other light is the faint, persistent glow of a network router, its LEDs blinking a silent, rhythmic conversation with something far beyond these cluttered walls.
